tasks.description: Construct Portfolio V1 and store to memory

subtasks.description: Select 15-20 longs and 10-15 shorts; set initial allocations targeting ~+30% net and <=200% gross (no tool)
Output portfolio_v1 to assistant (hard constraint) (no tool)
Call episodic_remember to store portfolio_v1 with title 'portfolio_v1' and full context
Call episodic_recall to retrieve portfolio_v1 for verification

tasks.description: Analyze Portfolio V1 for risk, factor, and performance

subtasks.description: Call correlation_matrix on portfolio_v1 to assess pairwise correlations
Call exposure_calculator on portfolio_v1 for 'net','gross','long','short' exposures
Call calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index on portfolio_v1 vs 'SPY' to measure beta
Call factor_tilts_for_portfolio on portfolio_v1 with factors='all'
Call industry_concentration on portfolio_v1 at industry and sub_industry levels
Call VaR_calculator on portfolio_v1 at level='portfolio' (repeat for 'industry' if needed)
Call calculate_portfolio_past_performance on portfolio_v1 for backtest metrics

tasks.description: Iterate to Portfolio V2 using insights and store to memory

subtasks.description: Refine holdings/allocations to lower beta/correlation and improve risk-adjusted return; keep hard constraints (no tool)
Output portfolio_v2 to assistant (no tool)
Call episodic_remember to store portfolio_v2 with title 'portfolio_v2'
Call episodic_recall to retrieve portfolio_v2

Run correlation_matrix, exposure_calculator, calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index, factor_tilts_for_portfolio, industry_concentration, VaR_calculator, calculate_portfolio_past_performance on portfolio_v2

tasks.description: Iterate to Portfolio V3 using refined analytics and store to memory

subtasks.description: Further optimize selections/weights to meet targets and reduce concentration/risks (no tool)
Output portfolio_v3 to assistant (no tool)
Call episodic_remember to store portfolio_v3 with title 'portfolio_v3'
Call episodic_recall to retrieve portfolio_v3

Run correlation_matrix, exposure_calculator, calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index, factor_tilts_for_portfolio, industry_concentration, VaR_calculator, calculate_portfolio_past_performance on portfolio_v3

tasks.description: Decide final portfolio and optimize allocations

subtasks.description: Select final holdings and allocations ensuring 15-20 longs, 10-15 shorts, ~+30% net, <=200% gross (no tool)
Call build_portfolio to optimize final weights and position sizes
Validate final with calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index, correlation_matrix, exposure_calculator, VaR_calculator, factor_tilts_for_portfolio, calculate_portfolio_past_performance; iterate if needed

tasks.description: Track execution and evidence for QA

subtasks.description: Call get_task_progress_summary and get_execution_summary to assess progress
Call add_task_evidence to attach key analytics snapshots; update_task_status as tasks advance
Call get_completion_analysis and check_plan_completion_status to confirm readiness; mark_task_complete when appropriate

tasks.description: Format and output the final portfolio per required JSON schema

subtasks.description: Assemble JSON array with objects: ticker, position, thesis, key_drivers, allocation from final optimized portfolio (no tool)
Validate JSON correctness and ensure concise theses and drivers (no tool)
